uniswap_v4.name: Uniswap v4
uniswap_v4.notes: Measured delta (audit C2): Foundry v4-core fork at PoolManager.initialize(USDC/WETH, fee=999_999, tickSpacing=8192, sqrtPriceX96=2**96) recorded PoolManager singleton storage toPool=79228162514264337593543950336 (post) vs 0 (pre). Real on-chain slot0 diff on a never-initialised PoolKey; evidence=data/security_results/impact/uniswap_v4_measured_delta.json. Token-unit deltas are 0 (no ERC-20 movement); the slot0 measurement is the canonical C2 substrate-binding proof. oracle=src/night_shift_security/impact/measured_oracle.py.

reserve.name: Reserve Protocol
reserve.notes: v6 §6 target-rotation onboarding + measured-delta gate. eUSD RToken proxy (0xA0d69...): totalSupply delta 24093358768753702159239 (~24.09M eUSD) across blocks 25349777-25354793 (5016 blocks / ~27.9h). ERC1967 proxy + RTokenP1 implementation stable; harness=src/night_shift_security/native/reserve.py; foundry/test/ReserveMeasure.t.sol; Python smoke=tests/test_native_reserve.py. Per SPEC §8.2 honest-zero gate was retained (skip-on-no-RPC) until the live fork probe proved real measured impact. Discovery-mode priority 1 of v6 §5.1.
